form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr1) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 6th-13.4 beaten 19 m by Dallas Miki (2:09.10) in NR 54 to 63 on April 7 at $18. At the start before 7th (Fr1) over 2190m at this track, beaten 55 m by Dallas Miki (2:38.50) in NR 57 to 64 on March 27 at $19. Strips fitter and from the pegs can be competitive.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to tire leaving the 400m mark to be beaten 55.6m.
Held up for clear running in the home straight on the final occasion.
Broke gait whilst under pressure passing the 100m.
Weakened over the final stages to finish in 8th position, beaten 52.8m.
Broke racing towards the back straight on the final occasion.
Pulled hard during the middle stages.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 8 m finishing fifth behind Hooklineandsinker at this track over 1790m in a NR 52 to 56 on March 27 at $2.50. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Dallas Miki at this track over 1790m in a NR 54 to 63 on April 7 at $3.20. Draws well and looks close to a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover from the 1100m mark.
Held up for clear running on the final turn.

form.formComment: Meets Dallas Miki again; was restrained, when 21 metres sixth at this track over 1790m in a NR 54 to 63 race on April 7. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Meets Dallas Miki again; was restrained, when 21 metres sixth at this track over 1790m in a NR 54 to 63 race on April 7. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up around the home turn and early in the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr4) over 1790m after showing early pace at this track was 4th-9 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Dallas Miki (2:09.10) in NR 54 to 63 on April 7 at $41. Two runs back tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; posted a big 4.5 m win (Sr1) at this track (2:12.40) beating Indianas Son in NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $10 at the bell was 3rd-4.4. Can play a role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and contacted marker pegs approaching the 1200m mark.
Held up for clear running on the final turn and in the home straight.
Eased out of the race leaving the 800m mark and did not complete the race.
Hung out throughout the score up.

form.formComment: Good performance when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second behind Hooklineandsinker at this track over 1790m in a NR 52 to 56 on March 27 at $10. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind Dallas Miki at this track over 1790m in a NR 54 to 63 on April 7 at $31. Rates highly. Expected to be in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running entering the home straight on the final occasion.
Gave ground to be beaten 44m into 7th position.
Hampered behind the tiring Break My Art between the 400m and the 250m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 7th (Sr2) over 1790m at this track beaten 30 m by Dallas Miki (2:09.10) in NR 54 to 63 on April 7 at $34. Before that 4th (Sr2) over 2190m at this track beaten 35 m by Dallas Miki (2:38.50) in NR 57 to 64 on March 27 at $18. Hard to have.
